description:
Offered: two-year cycle with LATN 1000, 1100, and 2000
This course is the second part of the introductory Latin sequence. In this course, students continue to build their knowledge of the vocabulary, grammar and syntax necessary for reading the Latin language.
Note: Students with 2-years or less of high school Latin may enroll in this course.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): WS
